title: eusteralis stocksii
side_effects: Eusteralis stocksii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, diarrhea, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's leaves or roots can lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Furthermore, improper use of Eusteralis stocksii can also cause skin irritation, itching, and inflammation, particularly in people with sensitive skin. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, potentially exacerbating their side effects.
